title: Monte Carlo Energy Aggregation for Mobile 3D Gaussian Splatting
innovation_summary: Monte Carlo Energy Aggregation for Mobile 3D Gaussian Splatting: In this paper, we present Flux-GS, a real-time Gaussian Splatting method designed to achieve high-fidelity rendering with significantly reduced overhead for resource-constrained mobile platforms.
